part1.question: How often do you use the internet?
part1.followUp: What do you mainly use the internet for?

part1.question: Do you enjoy online shopping?
part1.followUp: What was the last thing you bought online?

part1.question: What kinds of websites do you visit most frequently?
part1.followUp: How do you decide if a website is trustworthy?

part1.question: Do you prefer buying things online or in physical stores?
part1.followUp: What are the advantages of shopping online?

part2.cueCard: Describe a website you have bought something from.
bulletPoints: why you chose to buy from this website
and explain whether you were satisfied with the experience

questions: How has online shopping changed the way people shop?
What are the disadvantages of shopping online?
Do you think physical stores will disappear in the future?
How can online retailers improve the customer experience?
